brand.name: La Maison Bakery
brand.tagline: Handcrafted with love, baked fresh every morning.
brand.tone: Warm, sensory, and inviting. Use rich descriptive language about flavours, textures and aromas. Approachable but premium — never generic or corporate. Second-person ('you', 'your') to feel personal.
brand.audience: Food-loving locals aged 25-55 who care about quality, provenance, and artisan craft. They appreciate stories behind their food and are willing to pay more for something genuinely special.

page_structure: hero section with a compelling headline and one strong CTA
3 content sections each with an h2 heading
always_include: at least one sensory detail (smell, taste or texture)
a clear CTA button linking to the menu or ordering
the bakery name La Maison Bakery at least once
avoid: generic phrases like 'high quality' or 'wide variety'
filler phrases like 'in conclusion' or 'it goes without saying'

image_style.hero_image_style: Warm, moody food photography. Golden hour lighting. Rustic wooden surfaces. Fresh-baked bread, pastries, or cakes as the focus. Shallow depth of field. Soft bokeh background. No text or logos in the image. Warm amber and brown tones.
